items.briefing:
A recent ransomware attack on Canvas, a widely used education platform, raises important questions for training organisations. Security experts advise against paying ransoms — it doesn't guarantee data recovery and may invite further attacks. This is a timely reminder that educational institutions are active targets. Separately, global data privacy fines surged in early 2026, signalling that regulators are taking compliance failures more seriously than ever.

Closer to home, Snowflake has received Australian government security approval (IRAP) for its Melbourne cloud environment, which may benefit organisations handling sensitive data locally. **Practical tip:** Review what student and staff data your organisation stores in cloud platforms, and confirm those providers meet Australian data sovereignty requirements.
